## Checklist

- [ ] Build passes (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] No new linter warnings
- [ ] UI tested at 375px, 768px, 1440px (if UI changes)
- [ ] All themes verified (if CSS changes)
- [ ] Reduced motion tested (if animation changes)
- [ ] Keyboard-only navigation works (if interaction changes)
